title: IntegrationRequiredParam
description:
Param are form input values, primarily utilized when specifying secrets and
configuration values for actions.

These are especially important for partner integrations -- but can be
exposed to tenant admins as well if they want to parameterize their custom
actions.

required.description: The flag for if this parameter is required.

optional.description: The temp flag for if this parameter is required (experimental; for Labs use only).

label.description: The short label for this parameter.

description.description: The lengthier description for this parameter.

default_value.description: The default value for this parameter.

options.description: The allowable options for this param.
